title: NotificationRecipients
description: Details of the users and groups to receive the notification.

assignee.description: Whether the notification should be sent to the issue's assignees.

groupIds.description: List of groupIds to receive the notification.

groups.description: List of groups to receive the notification.

reporter.description: Whether the notification should be sent to the issue's reporter.

users.description: List of users to receive the notification.

voters.description: Whether the notification should be sent to the issue's voters.

watchers.description: Whether the notification should be sent to the issue's watchers.
